changelog: Added 'prune' command (alias 'pr') for stale release branch cleanup.
Prune detects local release branches whose tags already exist.
Added '--dry-run' flag to preview stale branches without deleting.
Added '--confirm' flag to skip interactive confirmation prompt.
Added '--remote' flag to also delete remote release branches.
Prune prints a summary showing deleted vs kept branch counts.
Added prune help text and shell tab-completion support.
Added prune documentation page to the docs site.
